meta.phase-name: Inheritance-Level Feature and Space View Refactor

phase-plan.purpose: Remove redundant model-space controls and make inheritance levels explicit in space and feature views.
phase-plan.scope: Remove Model Space UI section in controls, stop using tree checkbox multi-select, auto-render model-space overlays by inheritance chain, and split Features panel by base/class inheritance groups.

file.description: Inheritance chain overlays and feature grouping refactor.
